generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Use AGREE logical operators for branching logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {**... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Nested `if... then... else` for branching logic
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
